summary: A modern external balcony situated on an upper floor of a contemporary apartment block, overlooking an active construction site and rail/road infrastructure. The balcony is finished with grey composite decking, black powder-coated metal balustrade railings, and is accessed via aluminium-framed sliding doors. The space is well maintained and appears recently constructed with light surface debris only.

items.name: Composite decking flooring
items.description: Grey wood-effect composite decking boards laid in parallel runs with black expansion gaps, fitted across full balcony floor area.
defects: light surface debris and small white spots scattered mid level to deck
minor dust and grit to board grooves

items.name: Balustrade railing
items.description: Black powder-coated metal balustrade with vertical bar infill and flat top handrail capping, surrounding open sides of balcony.
defects: light dust to bars and handrail

items.name: External walls / rendered reveals
items.description: Off-white/cream rendered external wall surfaces and window reveals to balcony recess.
defects: light surface marking low level to render

items.name: Sliding patio door
items.description: Dark aluminium-framed double-glazed sliding patio door providing access from interior to balcony.
defects: glazing not clean, smears and water marks to exterior
dust to lower track and frame

items.name: Fixed glazing panel / window
items.description: Dark aluminium-framed full-height fixed glazed panel adjacent to sliding door.
defects: glazing not clean to exterior, reflections and surface marking

items.name: Threshold strip / door track
items.description: Aluminium threshold and sliding track strip at base of patio door between interior flooring and balcony decking.
defects: grit and debris to track channel
